mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_visitor WHERE visitor_token = #{visitorToken} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM chat_visitor WHERE ip = #{ip} AND bound_user_id IS NULL AND create_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_visitor WHERE ip = #{ip} AND create_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM chat_visitor WHERE device_fingerprint = #{deviceFingerprint} AND create_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
